title: Goldilocks and the Three Bears
content:
Once upon a time, three bears lived in a house in the woods.

There was a great big Papa Bear, a medium-sized Mama Bear, and a little Baby Bear.

One morning, they made porridge for breakfast. It was too hot to eat.

"Let's take a walk while it cools," said Mama Bear.

While they were gone, a little girl named Goldilocks came to the house.

She saw three bowls of porridge. She tasted the big bowl. "Too hot!" she said.

She tasted the medium bowl. "Too cold!"

She tasted the small bowl. "Just right!" She ate it all up.

Then Goldilocks saw three chairs. She sat in the big chair. "Too hard!"

She sat in the medium chair. "Too soft!"

She sat in the small chair. "Just right!" But the chair broke!

Goldilocks went upstairs. She tried three beds.

The big bed was too hard. The medium bed was too soft. The small bed was just right.

Goldilocks fell asleep.

The bears came home. "Someone's been eating my porridge!" they all said.

"Someone's been sitting in my chair!" they said. "And broken it!" cried Baby Bear.

Upstairs, they found Goldilocks in Baby Bear's bed!

Goldilocks woke up and saw the three bears. She jumped up and ran home.

She never went into anyone's house without asking again.

The End.

author: Robert Southey
